summary: Frontend testing for AI room detection overlay fix (z-index blocking issue). All tests passed. The ToolPresetSelector (z-50) is no longer blocked by the RoomDetector overlay (z-100) because the overlay now hides when presetSelectorOpen=true. handlePresetClose correctly clears detectedRoom state.
critical_code_review_comments: RoomDetector.js line 203: showOverlay = !presetSelectorOpen - correctly hides overlay when preset selector is open
RoomDetector.js line 213: z-[100] on overlay div, but now conditionally rendered based on presetSelectorOpen
ToolPresetSelector.js line 376: z-50 on dialog - properly layered below overlay when overlay is visible
App.js line 302: setToolPresetOpen(true) after room detection - triggers overlay to hide
App.js line 346: handlePresetClose correctly clears detectedRoom via setDetectedRoom(null)
App.js line 313: Measurement type 'room-ai' used for AI-detected rooms with roomData stored
App.js line 332: Room detector stays active after preset selection for detecting more rooms
context_for_next_testing_agent: The AI room detection overlay fix has been verified. Key fix: RoomDetector.js now accepts presetSelectorOpen prop and hides its clickable overlay when true. This allows ToolPresetSelector to receive clicks. The full room detection flow cannot be e2e tested without uploading a PDF and calibrating scale. Tests verified: 1) AI tool shows error without PDF, 2) ToolPresetSelector appears/closes correctly, 3) All preset groups work, 4) Tab navigation works, 5) Error toasts display correctly.

frontend.test: AI room detect tool button exists (data-testid='tool-room-detect')
Click AI tool without PDF shows 'Avaa PDF ensin' error toast
All 7 tool buttons present in toolbar
ToolPresetSelector appears when clicking drawing tools
ToolPresetSelector closes after selecting a preset
Count tool shows Pystykotelot presets (OVET JA IKKUNAT, PYSTYKOTELOT RAKENNUS sections)
Rectangle tool shows KATTO, LATTIA, ALAKATTO RAKENNUS preset groups
Laskenta tab shows ALV % and Oletuskorkeus settings
Määrälaskenta tab shows empty state message
Tabs navigation works between Määrälaskenta and Laskenta

RoomDetector.js.line_203: showOverlay = !presetSelectorOpen - hides overlay when preset selector is open
RoomDetector.js.line_208_222: Overlay div is conditionally rendered based on showOverlay

App.js.line_291_303: handleRoomDetected sets toolPresetOpen=true to show preset selector
App.js.line_306_341: handlePresetSelect creates 'room-ai' measurement and keeps room detector active

ToolPresetSelector.js.line_376: z-50 class for proper layering below RoomDetector overlay (z-100) when overlay is visible

z_index_analysis.RoomDetector_overlay: z-[100] - but conditionally rendered, hides when presetSelectorOpen=true
z_index_analysis.ToolPresetSelector: z-50 - always receives clicks when shown because overlay is hidden
z_index_analysis.fix_explanation: The fix ensures RoomDetector overlay is NOT rendered when ToolPresetSelector is open, so clicks pass through to the preset selector. Before the fix, the overlay (z-100) was always rendered and blocked clicks to the preset selector (z-50).
